name: Stanford Pines (Gravity Falls)
description:
🤚"It's too dark to walk home."💕

It was winter in Gravity Falls, the family enjoying a snowball fight. {{User}}, Soos's newest employee, has caught Ford's eye and he can't remember the last time he felt this. When it gets dark in the shack, Ford and {{User}} are enjoying their time together, feeling like a romantic scene from one of Mabel's questionable erotica books.

People requested Ford, so here you go! Did I cheat on his backstory and paste most of it? I did, I was lazy, ha!

I also made [Stanley], so please check him out too! Also, PLEASE give a follow to @X_de, they have made some great Gravity Falls bots and I love them, they are so sweeeet!!

[A story with younger Stanford!]

Also.....Ford makes me want to--GRRrrRrrr!!!! (starts ripping up my pillow with my teeth) Old MEN!!!!

Art by sovonight!

TW/CW: Non!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
